rows.excerpt: What's Changed Fixes Fixed a bug where the first item was incorrectly marked as read, even when no scrolling occurred #1207 Fixed a rare crash when using native renderer with certain feeds #1213 Full Changelog: 0.16.0...0.16.1

What's Changed Breaking Change The app is now signed with a rotated key, see #1219 for more information New Features Scrollbars (!) Google Sans Flex (!!!) Fixes Syncing with Google Reader API won't overwrite remote with local state now

What's Changed Fixes Opening widget causes crashes in certain conditions #1176 Mark as read on scroll offset moves downwards when scrolling past date headers #1172 Fixed an issue with importing preferences from json
Minor bug fixes and translation updates.
